---
name: "[Process Doc Update]: Create README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs with Summary and Links"
title: "[Process Doc Update]: Create README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs with Process Summary and Links"
labels:
  - documentation
  - process improvement
body: |
  ## Process Document to Update
  **<new document>** — This is a new README file to be created at `docs/README.md`

  ---

  ## Summary of New Content
  Create a README.md file in the docs/ folder that:
  1. Provides a brief overview of OctoAcme's project management approach and core principles
  2. Lists and links to all existing process documentation files
  3. Serves as the entry point and quick reference for team members learning about OctoAcme processes
  4. Includes a visual representation of the project lifecycle
  5. Provides guidance on how to use each document

  ---

  ## Why is this update needed?
  - **Identified gap**: Currently, there is no single entry point for accessing all OctoAcme project management documentation
  - **Team onboarding**: New team members need a clear, centralized place to understand the full project management process and how to navigate between phases
  - **Documentation discoverability**: A README makes it significantly easier to navigate between related process documents and understand their interconnections
  - **Best practice**: A README is the standard way to introduce a documentation folder and is typically the first thing users see when accessing the docs/ directory

  ---

  ## Suggested Content

  The new README should include:
  
  **Structure:**
  - Welcome introduction to OctoAcme Project Management documentation
  - Quick Start: OctoAcme Project Lifecycle (5 phases)
  - Core Principles section
  - Documentation links organized by:
    - Overview & Foundation
    - Lifecycle Phases (Initiation → Planning → Execution → Release → Retrospective)
    - Cross-Cutting Concerns (Risk Management, Roles & Personas)
  - "How to Use These Docs" quick navigation guide
  - Key Artifacts reference
  - Communication Cadence overview
  - Getting Started guidance for projects
  - Contact/support information

  **Key Links to Include:**
  - octoacme-project-management-overview.md
  - octoacme-project-initiation.md
  - octoacme-project-planning.md
  - octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md
  - octoacme-release-and-deployment.md
  - octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md
  - octoacme-risks-and-communication.md
  - octoacme-roles-and-personas.md

  ---

  ## Acceptance Criteria

  - [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
  - [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
  - [x] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
